mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, s.work_date, s.start_time, s.end_time, s.note, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM shifts s INNER JOIN employees e ON e.id = s.employee_id ORDER BY s.work_date DESC, s.start_time ASC, s.id DESC

SELECT s.id, s.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, s.work_date, s.start_time, s.end_time, s.note, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM shifts s INNER JOIN employees e ON e.id = s.employee_id WHERE s.employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY s.work_date DESC, s.start_time ASC, s.id DESC

SELECT s.id, s.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, s.work_date, s.start_time, s.end_time, s.note, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM shifts s INNER JOIN employees e ON e.id = s.employee_id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shifts ( employee_id, work_date, start_time, end_time, note, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{workDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{note}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE shifts SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, work_date = #{workDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, note = #{note}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
